calendar.matters:
Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony J. Dipiero, of Hunt & Henriques, Tel. 408.362.2295, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Candy Tom, in pro per, Tel. 415.298.6661, for defendants;
Certified Court Interpreter: Dorothy Wong, I.D.#300601, Tel. 415.699.1339.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CANDY TOM's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Judgment is DENIED. The trial date was clearly stated on the notice Defendant admits she read. Order signed in open court. Judge Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/RBU)

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Continued To Aug-31-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CANDY TOM'S Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Judgment is continued to August 31, 2015, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Parties must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 11, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant CANDY TOM.
Declaration of Colby pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant Eyre as follows:
Principal $4,559.21
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $284.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $4,843.21
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
